item.title: alibaba/OpenSandbox
item.abstract: OpenSandbox is a general-purpose sandbox platform for AI applications, offering multi-language SDKs, unified sandbox APIs, and Docker/Kubernetes runtimes for scenarios like Coding Agents, GUI Agents, Agent Evaluation, AI Code Execution, and RL Training.

llm_reason: OpenSandbox 解決了 AI 應用部署和評估的核心痛點，在 Agent 和 AI 程式執行當紅之際，具有很高的實用價值和話題性。
